description: You are a telecom compliance officer auditing the FCC license status for amateur radio stations 'W1AW' (ARRL HQ) and 'W6YX' (Stanford University). Using the FCC Universal Licensing System (http://wireless2.fcc.gov/UlsApp/UlsSearch/searchLicense.jsp), locate the active licenses for both call signs. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'FCC Audits' containing the specific license detail pages for both stations. Generate a JSON compliance report at '~/Documents/fcc_license_audit.json' using the call signs as keys, including the 'frn', 'status', 'grant_date', and 'expiration_date' for each station.
